Manual matching from real submissions. Hiring teams can send one clear brief with budget, format, deliverables, and review cadence.

Role examples

Categories the feed is learning from

Remote

Long-form to clips editor

Coaches, founders, educators, podcasts

  • weekly cadence
  • clip selection
  • caption taste
Remote or hybrid

YouTube channel editor

Long-form YouTube, podcasts, education, creator-led brands

  • story pacing
  • retention edits
  • thumbnail collaboration
Contract

Podcast repurposing editor

Founder shows, expert interviews, coaching calls

  • audio cleanup
  • multicam rhythm
  • shorts packages
Part-time

Recurring social editor

Monthly content packages for creator-led businesses

  • brand consistency
  • turnaround
  • review discipline

Two focused intake paths

Editors share portfolio, rates, software, availability, and the editing formats they want. Hiring teams share budget, workflow, deliverables, deadline, and examples of the style they need.

Why this should be narrower than a generic job board

Editing roles are often posted with unclear expectations. Useful matching starts with workflow, turnaround time, content format, review cadence, source footage quality, and whether the role is creator-side, agency-side, or brand-side.

Blog

Guides that support better matches

Editors

Where to find video editor jobs

The best video editor opportunities are split across job boards, private communities, creator teams, agencies, referrals, and local production networks.
Hiring teams

How to hire a video editor

The fastest way to hire a strong editor is to write a brief that filters for the actual workflow, not just taste.
Hiring teams

Video editor job description template

Most editing job posts are too vague. This structure helps editors self-select before either side wastes time.

Browse

The few routes worth testing first

Remote editing work Remote Video Editor Jobs Contract editing work Freelance Video Editor Jobs Creator channel work YouTube Video Editor Jobs Flexible editing work Part-Time Video Editor Jobs Early community Video Editor Community

Answers

Questions editors and hiring teams ask first

What kinds of video editor jobs will be listed?

The first version focuses on remote, freelance, YouTube, social video, podcast, brand, agency, and assistant editor roles.

Can editors join before jobs are public?

Yes. Editors can submit a portfolio and work preferences now so the early community has talent supply before public job listings scale.

Can employers post roles?

Yes. Hiring teams can submit an early brief with role type, editing stack, content format, compensation, timezone, and portfolio requirements.
